name: @gerdloos/npm-trusts-github-skill
description_en: A skill that teaches an LLM how to set up and/or use npm trusted publishing (OIDC) with GitHub Actions. No long-lived tokens, no 2FA prompts, no manual rotation.
description_zh: 一项技能，教授 LLM 如何使用 GitHub Actions 设置和/或使用 npm 信任发布（OIDC）。无需长期令牌，无需双因素认证提示，无需手动轮换。
